description_long: This is a compact, urban-style motor scooter with a predominantly black exterior and subtle red accents. The scooter features a padded, elongated seat suitable for one or two riders, and a rear luggage rack or grab handle. The front section includes a prominent handlebar with rearview mirrors and a small front fender above the wheel. The wheels are medium-sized with visible treads, and the exhaust pipe is mounted low on the right side. The bodywork shows signs of wear, with some faded paint and minor scuffs, suggesting regular use in city environments. There are some markings and a possible logo or text on the side and rear, but they are partially obscured or faded.
description: A well-used black motor scooter with a padded seat, rear rack, and visible wear, designed for urban commuting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the scooter, including the seat, wheels, and exhaust pipe.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the taillight, license plate area, and rear wheel alignment.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the seat, wheels, and the low-mounted exhaust pipe.
description_view_3: Front view showing the handlebar, front fender, and a faint logo or marking on the front panel.
attribute_deck_design: elongated, moderately wide, flat with a slightly textured surface and footrests
attribute_brand_logo: faded red markings on the side and a faint logo or text on the front panel
